description.zh: 莫卧儿帝国是印度次大陆最辉煌的伊斯兰帝国，以曼萨布达尔（等级官制）为核心行政制度。皇帝（Padshah）被尊为「神在人间的影子」，通过财务大臣（Diwan）、军事总监（Mir Bakshi）、宗教大臣（Sadr）、首席法官（Qazi）和省督（Subedar）等分层官僚体系治理广袤领土。帝国以宗教融合、建筑艺术和文化繁荣闻名。
description.en: The Mughal Empire was the most magnificent Islamic empire on the Indian subcontinent, built around the Mansabdar ranked official system. The Padshah (Emperor), revered as 'Shadow of God on Earth,' governed vast territories through a layered bureaucracy including the Diwan (Finance Minister), Mir Bakshi (Military Paymaster), Sadr (Religious Affairs), Qazi (Chief Justice), and Subedars (Provincial Governors). The empire was renowned for religious syncretism, architectural splendor, and cultural flourishing.

agents.name: Padshah
agents.title: Emperor / 皇帝
agents.description: Shadow of God on Earth, supreme sovereign of Hindustan

agents.name: Diwan
agents.title: Finance Minister / 财务大臣
agents.description: Head of revenue administration and imperial treasury

agents.name: Mir_Bakshi
agents.title: Military Paymaster / 军事总监
agents.description: Head of military administration, maintains mansabdar rolls

agents.name: Sadr
agents.title: Religious Affairs / 宗教大臣
agents.description: Oversees religious endowments, charitable grants, and ecclesiastical matters

agents.name: Qazi
agents.title: Chief Justice / 首席法官
agents.description: Administers Islamic law, arbitrates disputes, upholds justice

agents.name: Subedar
agents.title: Provincial Governor / 省督
agents.description: Governs a subah (province) on behalf of the Padshah

agents.name: Wazir
agents.title: Prime Minister / 宰相
agents.description: Chief minister coordinating all departments of state
